title: DataTabs
description: Makes Minecraft's creative tabs data driven!
body:
This is a simple mod for the latest Minecraft snapshot that allows defining a creative tab's content in json

 

This currently supports:

  • Replacing the entire contents of a tab
  • Using tags in a creative tab
  • Adding items to already existing tabs

 

Here is a example datapack https://github.com/AlphaMode/DataTabs/tree/22w42a/examplepack
